componentDescription: A container component that provides a visually distinct background with customizable layers and decorative elements.

children.description: Optional React nodes to be rendered as children within the Background component.

shape.description: Overrides or specifies the shape for the background layout component.

decorationRotation.description: Controls the rotation angle of any decorative elements.

decorationScale.description: Adjusts the scale factor of any decorative elements.

decorationOpacity.description: Sets the opacity level for any decorative elements.

views.type: { container?: ViewProps; content?: ViewProps; back?: ViewProps; front?: ViewProps; }
views.description: Optional styling properties for specific sub-components within the background layout.

themeMode.description: Specifies the theme mode ('light' or 'dark') to apply to the background.
